name: agenttown
description: Local-first AI workshop supervisor for Claude, Codex, and other terminal coding agents.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const { ensureNodePtySpawnHelper } = require('./src/runtime/ensure-node-pty'); const result = ensureNodePtySpawnHelper(); if (result.changed.length) console.log('Repaired node-pty spawn-helper permissions:', result.changed.join(', '));"
